title: cli: MLS Welcome accepted from any sender — forged group join
description: cli/src/commands.rs:1040-1093 — WhisperDeliver handler: when \!mls_active and payload is binary (not JSON), the code calls mls.join_from_welcome(&payload) without verifying 'from' matches online[0] (the expected admin). Any relay-authenticated user can whisper a crafted MLS Welcome and inject the target into an attacker-controlled MLS group — all subsequent 'encrypted' messages are readable/forgeable by the attacker. Same structure present in tui/src/event.rs at the corresponding whisper_deliver handler. Fix: reject Welcome payloads where from \!= online[0].pub_id.
